message:
fix(server): display resolved database path in startup banner instead of raw URL

Reverts the database_url format change (back to sqlite:///) and instead
fixes the cosmetic issue at the display layer: the startup banner now
calls sqlite_file_path_from_database_url() to resolve the filesystem
path, displaying `/Users/…/storage.sqlite3` instead of the raw
`sqlite:////Users/…/storage.sqlite3` URL scheme.

This approach keeps the database_url in its canonical form (which other
components expect) while presenting a clean path in the banner output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
